brief_justification: Arrives at exact correct answer (C) with valid elimination of all alternatives; traces second/third-order effects (D collapsing into C, camera disabling as concealment of re-arm sequence, insider access pattern across 3 evidence types); acknowledges graceful degradation but does not name biases or course-correct mid-analysis; verifies by cross-checking all 6 evidence pieces against C and showing D's logical collapse, but no counterfactual or boundary test; acknowledges uncertainty in neighbor timing and safe combo knowledge but no structured confidence levels; systematically evaluates and rejects A/B/D with specific evidence citations before validating C; every conclusion cites specific evidence codes (E1-E6) and a timeline table a third party could reproduce; avoids reverse causality by building timeline before reasoning, but never names the anti-pattern explicitly; avoids coincidence conflation, order insensitivity, and correlation-to-causation leaps but does not explicitly call out any suppressed mode; constructs temporal sequence first (S1/S2 alignment) but reasoning proceeds as linear option evaluation, not following the G1/G2/G3 gate branching structure of the topology.
